# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  name: istio-admin
spec:
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: true
  values:
    global:
      proxy:
        adminPort: 15000
    pilot:
      configMap: true
    sidecarInjectorWebhook:
      injectLabel: istio-injection
      enableNamespacesByDefault: true
  meshConfig:
    defaultConfig:
      proxyAdminPort: 15000
      proxyStatsMatcher:
        inclusionList:
          - prefix: "cluster_manager"
          - prefix: "listener_manager"
          - prefix: "server"
          - prefix: "cluster"
          - prefix: "stats"
          - prefix: "config_dump"
    accessLogFile: /dev/stdout
    accessLogFormat: "%START_TIME% %REQ(:METHOD)% %REQ(X-FORWARDED-FOR)% %REQ(:AUTHORITY)% %RESP(X-ENVOY-UPSTREAM-SERVICE-TIME)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-UPSTREAM-SERVICE-TIME)% %RESPONSE_CODE% %RESPONSE_FLAGS% %BYTES_RECEIVED% %BYTES_SENT% %DURATION% %RESP(X-ENVOY-UPSTREAM-SERVICE-TIME)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-UPSTREAM-SERVICE-TIME)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-UPSTREAM-SERVICE-TIME)% %REQ(X-ENVOY-UPSTREAM-SERVICE-TIME)%
